summary: Software-defined test instruments for engineering labs.
editor_note: This is what test equipment looks like when software wins over the bench rack. Liquid Instruments turns Moku hardware into 15+ instruments, switches setups in seconds, and lets teams build custom measurement systems with FPGA-backed processing. Unlike another oscilloscope vendor, it treats instrumentation as a reconfigurable platform. The question is whether AI customization becomes a workflow, not just a lab upgrade.

product_evidence.claim: Official product positioning describes Liquid Instruments: Software-defined test instruments for engineering labs.
Liquid Instruments turns Moku hardware into 15+ instruments, switches setups in seconds, and lets teams build custom measurement systems with FPGA-backed processing.
